hero.badge: 7-day free trial — no credit card required
hero.title: Working hard isn't enough.
hero.subtitle: GrindBoard organizes your entire exam prep with a Pomodoro timer, weekly schedule, and topic tracker — all in one place. Waste less time, complete more topics.

features.title: Everything you need to ace your exams
features.subtitle: No more scattered notes, forgotten topics, or wasted hours — just a clear system.

pomodoro.title: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro.description: Focus for 25 minutes, rest for 5. This scientifically-backed method improves attention span and long-term retention. Customize work and break durations to fit your routine and log each session by subject.

schedule.title: Weekly Study Schedule
schedule.description: Add study blocks to each day of the week and build a visual schedule. Set up routines like 'morning math, afternoon literature' once, then follow through the week. Knowing what to study — and when — doubles your motivation.

topics.title: Topic Tracker
topics.description: Manage topic lists organized by subject. Mark each topic as 'Not Started', 'In Progress', or 'Completed'. See at a glance what's left to cover, add notes, and stay on top of everything until exam day.

stats.title: Detailed Statistics
stats.description: Analyze your study time with daily, weekly, and monthly charts. See how much time you've spent on each subject, your most productive hours, and your current streak — all on one screen. Make data-driven decisions.

streak.title: Study Streak
streak.description: Build consistency by maintaining your daily study streak. Consecutive study days are the most powerful habit-forming mechanism. GrindBoard reminds you when your streak is at risk, keeping your motivation alive.

multiplatform.title: Access From Any Device
multiplatform.description: Log in from your phone, tablet, or laptop — your data syncs instantly. Start a session at the library and continue from home without missing a beat. Cloud-based and always in sync.

howItWorks.title: Get started in three steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No complex setup. Create an account, add your subjects, and start studying.

step1.title: Create your account
step1.description: Sign up with your email and start a 7-day free trial. No credit card information required.

step2.title: Add your subjects and topics
step2.description: Enter your subjects, build a topic list for each one, and set up your weekly schedule with time blocks.

step3.title: Focus and track
step3.description: Start sessions with the Pomodoro timer, check off completed topics, and watch your progress through statistics.

pricing.title: Honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: One plan, all features included. No hidden fees, no surprises.

testimonials.title: What students say
testimonials.subtitle: Real reviews from students across Turkey

faq.title: Your questions, answered
faq.subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Reach out to our support team.

items.q: How does the free trial work?
items.a: After signing up, you get full access to all features for 7 days — completely free. You'll receive a reminder email before the trial ends. You can cancel at any time during the trial and you won't be charged.

items.q: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
items.a: You can cancel anytime with a single click from the Settings page. Cancellation takes effect immediately, but you'll retain access to the platform until the end of your current billing period. No charges after that.

items.q: Which exams is it designed for?
items.a: GrindBoard isn't tied to any specific exam. You can use it for SAT, GRE, GMAT, university finals, professional certification exams, or any personal learning goal. You create your own subject and topic structure from scratch.

items.q: Can I access my data from multiple devices?
items.a: Yes. GrindBoard is fully cloud-based. Log in from your phone, tablet, or computer with the same account and all your data — topics, sessions, and statistics — is available instantly.

items.q: Does the Pomodoro technique actually work?
items.a: It does. The Pomodoro Technique was developed by Francesco Cirillo and is backed by multiple scientific studies. Short, focused work intervals improve attention span, reduce mental fatigue, and support long-term memory retention. You can customize both work and break durations to fit your personal rhythm.
Payments are handled by Lemon Squeezy, a PCI-DSS compliant payment processor. We never store your card information directly. All personal data is protected with row-level security and SSL encryption.

items.q: Will the price go up later?
items.a: For existing subscribers, the price won't change. If we ever raise prices for new users, your subscription remains locked at $4.99/month.
Currently GrindBoard is a web application that works seamlessly on mobile browsers in full-screen mode. A native mobile app is in development and will be released soon.

cta.title: The best time to start is now
cta.subtitle: Every day you delay is a topic left uncovered. Try it free for 7 days and see the difference.
cta.sub: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.

footer.slogan: Waste less time, complete more topics.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At GrindBoard, we value your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect when you use our service and how we use it.

sections.title: Data We Collect
sections.content: When you create an account, we collect your email address and name. Study sessions, Pomodoro records, weekly schedules, and topic tracking data generated while using the service are also stored in our system. Billing information for payment processing is handled by Lemon Squeezy — we never see your card details.

sections.title: How We Use Your Data
sections.content: The data we collect is used solely to manage your account, provide you with the service, and ensure the application functions correctly. We do not sell your data to third parties or use it for advertising purposes.

sections.title: Who We Share Your Data With
sections.content: We work with Supabase (database and authentication infrastructure), Lemon Squeezy (payment processing), and Vercel (application hosting). These providers access only the data necessary to perform the service function and are subject to their own privacy policies.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: We only use essential cookies for session management. We do not use third-party tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, all your personal data is permanently removed from our systems.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, and object to the processing of your data. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the address below.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For questions about our privacy policy: support@grindboard.org

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Please read these terms before using GrindBoard. By using the service, you agree to these terms.

sections.title: Service Description
sections.content: GrindBoard is an online educational organization platform that includes a Pomodoro timer, weekly study schedule, topic tracking, and statistics tools.

sections.title: Account Creation
sections.content: You must be at least 13 years old to use our service. You are responsible for the security of your account credentials and all activity that occurs under your account.

sections.title: Payment Terms
sections.content: GrindBoard Pro is available at $4.99/month or $39.99/year. All new accounts receive a 7-day free trial. No payment is collected during the trial period; the subscription begins automatically after the trial ends.

sections.title: Cancellation Policy
sections.content: You can cancel your subscription at any time. Cancellation takes effect immediately, but you retain access to the platform until the end of your current billing period. No charges are made after the period ends.

sections.title: Refund Policy
sections.content: For annual subscriptions, you may request a full refund within 14 days of purchase. Monthly subscriptions are non-refundable. Refund requests should be sent to support@grindboard.org.

sections.title: Prohibited Behavior
sections.content: It is prohibited to misuse our service, gain unauthorized access to others' accounts, send spam, reverse engineer the software, or use it for any illegal purpose.

sections.title: Service Changes
sections.content: Features and prices may change from time to time. You will be notified at your registered email address prior to significant changes.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: GrindBoard is an educational organization tool. Exam success or academic outcomes are not guaranteed. Results arising from use of the service are the user's responsibility.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey. Istanbul courts and enforcement offices have jurisdiction over any disputes.

contact.title: Contact
contact.responseTime: We typically respond to messages within 24-48 hours.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successDesc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible. Thank you.
